历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were 3477 → 3294 → 3112 → 4004 → 3972, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; in 2024, the ranking significantly shifted back to 4004, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 3972, with the recent two-year baseline around 4000; the enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Henan was 30 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 34 in 2024, and 32 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 28, a reduction of 4 (-12.5%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable position in the 60–65 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps; Douyin popularity ranking 52nd (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure and general application attention; Hydraulic Engineering A+ (top in China), Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, all are the university's flagship disciplines, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include Law, Accounting, Financial Management, and Ideological and Political Education, among which Law has high social popularity, while Accounting and Finance show divergent trends; the total number of Henan Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from 2025), with an estimated 466,000 history category candidates, intensifying competition; the 2025 history category undergraduate batch score was 471, showing a downward trend in recent years; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a popular region in the Yangtze River Delta; its enrollment proportion in Henan is about 4.5%, at a medium level, with no special regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3972, the 2026 enrollment reduction (easing competition), the significant increase in local candidates (intensifying competition), and stable reputation, it is expected that the 2026 liberal arts minimum ranking will slightly move forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3644, with a range of 3144–4144.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3144–4144, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 3100), you can focus on Tier 1 majors like Law and Accounting; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., above 4000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors for a stable application.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were 17797 → 17463 → 17028 → 35948 → 24764 respectively; in 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking significantly dropped (35948), and in 2025 it rebounded to 24764, showing drastic fluctuations in the past two years; the enrollment plan for this university in Henan science (physics category) was 190 in 2021, 201 in 2022, 219 in 2023, 222 in 2024, and 233 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 308, a substantial increase of 75 (+32.2%) compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 60–65 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking 52nd (relatively hot), short video exposure moderate, application attention average; Water Conservancy Engineering A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, all are flagship disciplines of the university; Water Conservancy, Civil Engineering, and Environmental majors have strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's science enrollment majors include Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Water Conservancy, Civil Engineering, etc.; among them, Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering (highly recommended) are the most popular directions in recent years; although Water Conservancy is a flagship, its social popularity is average; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan college entrance examination is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from 2025), with physics category candidates estimated at about 734,000, intensifying competition; the provincial control line for the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 427 points, showing a downward trend in recent years; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a popular region in the Yangtze River Delta; the university's enrollment proportion in Henan is about 4.5%, at a medium level, with no special regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 24764, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (easing competition), the substantial increase in local candidates (intensifying competition), the appeal of the flagship Water Conservancy A+ discipline, and the high popularity of hot majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will significantly drop compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 29598, with a range of 29098–30098.
